2_primaryJTBD.decision: Which badges and achievements should I work towards next?

items: Implicit: Work on tests for badges near completion

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: MODERATE - Information-heavy as expected for achievements/badges page, but lacks clear actionable next steps
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: No - Primarily informational with implicit next actions

4_visualHierarchy.heroElement: Active tab content area with summary cards
4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Clear tab-based hierarchy with visual separation

kpis.note: Count without context on what to do next
Shows specific test gaps to fill

5_kpiQuality.assessment: MODERATE - Mix of actionable (progress bars) and vanity metrics (counts, percentages)

6_languageAndMentalModel.assessment: MODERATE - Achievement-focused language but lacks action verbs for what user should do
phrasesToRewrite: 'Nesten oppnådd' → 'Complete 1 more test to unlock' (be specific)
'Fremgang mot neste merker' → 'Your next badge unlock opportunities'

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: MODERATE - Can see progress easily, but no direct action links to tests or tasks
shouldBeInline: Direct links from progress bars to relevant tests/tasks

8_stateCoverage.assessment: WEAK - No state handling, hardcoded mock data
gaps: No loading state for badge/achievement data
No empty state for new users with no achievements
No error handling for data fetch failures
No success celebration when badge is unlocked

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all levels - clear progression visible

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Gamification hub with good visual design but weak actionability
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Actionable progression hub with clear next steps

topIssues.issue: No API integration - all data is hardcoded mock
Progress cards don't link to actionable tasks or tests
topIssues.impact: User sees they need '1 more test' but can't click to do it

topIssues.issue: Mix of Norwegian (Merker) and English (Achievements) naming

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Add API integration + clickable progress cards linking to test pages + standardize language to English or Norwegian

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader pattern (consistent). 2-tab structure similar to AnalyseStatistikkHub. Gamification patterns align with badge system referenced in other pages.

dataSource.note: 100% hardcoded mock data - no API calls

accessibility.keyboardNav: Good - uses button elements for tabs

overallAssessment: MODERATE - Good visual design for gamification, but needs API integration and actionable links to be production-ready
